author: gb9t
content: Iteration 34: infiniband/efa.md committed (4a355c9, 199 lines). AWS Elastic Fabric Adapter — every AWS HPC/ML instance + NCCL training + Trainium. ~5100 LOC, smallest RDMA driver. SRD (Scalable Reliable Datagram) transport — connectionless, not RoCE. Driver minimal; Nitro firmware does heavy lifting. Trust model: Nitro-firmware-as-adversary (parallel to ENA). Defenses: admin CQ source-id strict, AENQ event group allowlist + payload length, MR bounds + rkey high-entropy (RDMA defense parallel to mlx5_ib), dmabuf-MR strict for GPUDirect, per-ctx resource quotas, multi-EFA per-device isolation (critical for p5.48xlarge with 32 EFAs/VM), no SRP/iSER/nvme-rdma exposure (-EOPNOTSUPP). RDMA tier coverage: mlx5_ib + bnxt_re + efa (three major production fabrics covering on-prem + Azure + AWS). 34 docs / ~2.01M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/scsi/qedi or drivers/scsi/qedf (QLogic FC/iSCSI offload sibling to qla2xxx), or pivot to a fresh tier — drivers/net/ethernet/pensando/ionic (AMD Pensando DSC SmartNIC) for SmartNIC tier completion.
